comment: Shatter — a stutter / beat-repeat glitch processor for drums and rhythmic material. Slices the signal on a grid; with some probability each slice is retriggered (stutter), reversed, and/or bitcrushed. Great on drum machines. Desktop preview implements the full DSP; pedal C port is staged (audio_nop smoke build).
gid_comment: 0x08 = Delay category. Buffer/slice-based, like the other ctx[3] effects.
fxid_comment: 0x01C4 = above the repo's used range, distinct from microloom (450) and flower (451). Verify uniqueness before flashing.

params.name: Rate
params.comment: Glitch grid speed: slice length ~400ms (slow) to ~30ms (fast/chopped).

params.name: Chance
params.comment: Probability each slice is glitched. 0 = clean pass-through, 100 = every slice.

params.name: Repeat
params.comment: Stutter subdivisions per slice (2 = halve-repeat, high = fast machine-gun retrigger).

params.name: Reverse
params.comment: Probability a glitched slice plays backwards instead of stuttering.

params.name: Crush
params.comment: Bitcrush + sample-rate reduction on the wet path for lo-fi grit.

params.name: Mix
params.comment: Dry/wet blend. Glitch is usually 100% wet.

audio_nop_comment: Pedal C port starts as a UI-only smoke build. Full DSP validated on desktop first; see tools/audio_preview/renderers/shatter.py.
